title: Document screenshot-reconstruction-gym's API for Phase E integration of scaffold-app-from-web
description: screenshot-reconstruction-gym exists at wrkstrm-research/private/universal/domain/generative-ui/gym/screenshot-reconstruction-gym.mac.app/. For Phase E of scaffold-app-from-web (reconstruct-views), need to invoke its engine programmatically: inputs (layout tree JSON from Phase A + screenshots at multiple viewports + color palette + typography) -> outputs (SwiftUI source files representing the reconstructed view tree). Bead is to (a) read the gym's existing Sources/ + identify its core reconstruction engine, (b) document its public API + invocation surface, (c) determine whether it currently has a CLI / library product or whether scaffold-app-from-web needs to add one, (d) document the JSON contract between Phase A's layout.json and the engine's input format. Output: API spec doc at wrkstrm-research/.../generative-ui/threads/screenshot-reconstruction-gym-api.docc/index.md.
